verification_notes: HELD — DUPLICATE OF ALREADY-PUBLISHED COURSE. This slug refers to Life Privilege Country Club (formerly Mission Hills Khao Yai), the Jack Nicklaus Signature course at Tambol Mu Si, Pak Chong, Nakhon Ratchasima. That course is already fully published under the 'bangkok' region with slug 'life-privilege-country-club' (see docs/course-guide/data/4.approved/bangkok/life-privilege-country-club.json). Despite the 'bangkok' region label, the published record correctly places the course in Nakhon Ratchasima Province (Pak Chong) near Khao Yai — effectively the same region as this batch. There is only one Life Privilege Country Club formerly known as Mission Hills Khao Yai. Publishing a second page for the same course under a different slug would create duplicate content. ACTION REQUIRED: Either (a) move the existing 'life-privilege-country-club' record from the bangkok region to khao-yai region and redirect the old URL, or (b) keep it in the bangkok region (where it was originally filed) and do not publish this slug. Do NOT publish 'life-privilege-country-club-khaoyai' as a separate page.
disputes: The task brief listed this as a separate course to investigate. Investigation confirms it is the same course as the already-published life-privilege-country-club (Bangkok region). All web sources (allsquaregolf.com, 1golf.eu, golflux.com, golfasian.com, nicklausdesign.com) describe exactly one Life Privilege Country Club formerly Mission Hills Khao Yai, located at Tambol Mu Si, Pak Chong, Nakhon Ratchasima. No second course with this name exists in the Khao Yai area.

name.value: Life Privilege Country Club (formerly Mission Hills Khao Yai)

prose.overview: HELD — see verification_notes. This record is not for publication.
